about.title: Solving Ethiopia rural energy challenges.
about.intro: Established in 2016, Meseret Mare Gebre Solar Products Importer distributes certified, affordable solar solutions for off-grid homes, farms, and institutions.
about.signature_text: Focused on affordability, trust, and clean energy access for rural communities.
intro_paragraphs: Meseret Mare Gebre Solar Products Importer was established to address Ethiopia's critical energy shortage, especially in rural and off-grid areas. We import and distribute high-quality solar products at affordable rates to improve household life, agricultural productivity, and institutional reliability.
By replacing kerosene lighting, powering irrigation, and supporting productive use, we create safer homes, more productive farms, and stronger local economies.
about.mission_description: Fulfill the power needs of the Ethiopian people with high-quality service and innovative solar solutions that benefit customers and partners.
about.vision_description: Completely alleviate the power challenges of rural Ethiopians through sustainable, green, and affordable solar technologies.
about.values_intro: The principles that guide every decision we make.
about.timeline_intro: Key milestones in our mission to power Ethiopia.

services.title: Full lifecycle solar delivery.
services.intro: From site assessment and system design to import, installation, training, monitoring, and long-term maintenance.
